title: OpenAI reveals its first AI processor: Jalapeño
author: Emma Roth
raw_description: OpenAI has just revealed a new "intelligence processor" chip for AI servers made in partnership with Broadcom. The chip, called Jalapeño, is designed to power current and future large language models, according to an announcement on Wednesday. Jalapeño is an ASIC (Application-Specific Integrated Circuit), meaning it's designed for a specific purpose: AI inference. With AI […]
summary: OpenAI与Broadcom合作推出首款AI专用芯片Jalapeño，为ASIC设计，专用于AI推理，旨在提升大语言模型性能。
analysis_note: 重大硬件突破，直接提升LLM推理效率，技术深度高，但信息有限需后续验证。
